resources.string: Copy a video link, tap the floating button, save it to your phone.

How to use:
1. Run the TapSave backend and put its address above.
2. Grant the overlay permission and start the floating button.
3. In TikTok/Instagram/YouTube/Pinterest, copy the video link (or Share to TapSave).
4. Tap the floating button — it downloads and saves to Downloads/TapSave.

For content you own or have permission to download.
